2603.23871.title: HDPO: Hybrid Distillation Policy Optimization via Privileged Self-Distillation
2603.23871.paper_summary: Large language models trained with reinforcement learning (RL) for mathematical reasoning face a fundamental challenge: on problems the model cannot solve at all - "cliff" prompts - the RL gradient vanishes entirely, preventing any learning signal from reaching these failure modes. We introduce Hybrid Distillation Policy Optimization (HDPO), which augments standard RL with privileged self-distillation targeting cliff prompts. On each training step, HDPO identifies prompts where all rollouts fail, generates privileged rollouts by providing the model with ground-truth information, filters for correct solutions, and distills the teacher's token-level distribution into the student. Because teacher and student share the same weights - differing only in their input - the realizability gap is provably bounded, unlike cross-model distillation. We prove that R=1 filtered privileged generation recovers the optimal KL-regularized RL policy in the hard-threshold limit. Experiments on OpenMathInstruct-2 with Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B-Instruct show that HDPO consistently improves coverage metrics (pass@4 by +0.8-1.1%, pass@8 by +0.4-1.7%) while maintaining greedy accuracy, with the distillation weight lambda providing direct control over the exploration-exploitation tradeoff.
2603.23871.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型在數學推理中使用強化學習（RL）訓練面臨一個根本挑戰：在模型完全無法解決的問題上——“懸崖”提示——RL 梯度完全消失，阻止任何學習信號到達這些失敗模式。<lb/>我們引入混合蒸餾策略優化（HDPO），它通過針對懸崖提示的特權自我蒸餾來增強標準 RL。<lb/>在每個訓練步驟中，HDPO 識別所有回合都失敗的提示，通過提供模型真實信息生成特權回合，篩選正確解決方案，並將教師的標記級分佈蒸餾到學生中。<lb/>因為教師和學生共享相同的權重——僅在輸入上有所不同——所以可實現性差距是可證明有界的，這與跨模型蒸餾不同。<lb/>我們證明 R=1 篩選的特權生成在硬閾值極限中恢復最佳的 KL 正則化 RL 策略。<lb/>在 OpenMathInstruct-2 上進行的實驗顯示，使用 Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B-Instruct 的 HDPO 一直改善覆蓋率指標（pass@4 提高 +0.8-1.1%，pass@8 提高 +0.4-1.7%），同時保持貪婪準確性，蒸餾權重 lambda 直接控制探索與利用的權衡。
2603.23871.author: Ken Ding et.al.
